# uptimekuma_notification_signl4 (Resource)

SIGNL4 notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_signl4" "example" {
  name        = "SIGNL4 Alerts"
  webhook_url = "https://connect.signl4.com/webhook/YOUR_TEAM_SECRET"
  is_active   = true
  is_default  = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Notification name
- `webhook_url` (String, Sensitive) SIGNL4 webhook URL for receiving notifications

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
